forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely this afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast this morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Patchy fog this morning, mainly west of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Patches of morning frost in the far west. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far northeast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
